name: Sugar 'n' Spice Apple-Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt) and mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract, chopped apples, and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream on top.
